title: DevPulse
description: A developer productivity intelligence platform connecting to GitHub via OAuth2, analysing commit patterns, PR cycle times, and code churn — eliminating spreadsheet-based tracking for engineering managers.
longDescription: Built for engineering managers who are tired of spreadsheet-based tracking. DevPulse connects to GitHub via OAuth2 and uses Spring Batch nightly jobs for data ingestion — processing 10,000+ commits per run with fault-tolerant chunked processing and automatic retry logic. React/D3.js dashboards surface team heatmaps, contribution graphs, and exportable PDF productivity reports.

title: CodeGrade
description: An automated code evaluation platform executing student submissions in isolated Docker containers, eliminating manual grading for 500+ assignments — targeting EdTech platforms like Scaler and InterviewBit.
longDescription: Engineered secure Docker-in-Docker sandboxed execution with CPU/memory limits and 5-second timeout enforcement, preventing resource exhaustion attacks. Real-time grading feedback via Spring WebSocket reduces wait time to under 3 seconds. Achieved 85%+ code coverage with JUnit + Mockito test suites.

title: Codenest
description: A unified platform for real-time collaborative coding (Monaco Editor), live lectures (Mux + HLS.js), payments (Cashfree), and gamified student-teacher interaction — solving fragmented developer collaboration.
longDescription: Achieved sub-100ms WebRTC sync latency across concurrent sessions via scalable Nginx reverse-proxy architecture on Render. Integrated Socket.IO for real-time collaborative state management across 50+ simultaneous users with conflict resolution. Full live-streaming infrastructure built with Mux and HLS.js.

title: Hushmail
description: A decentralised anonymous platform with Solidity smart contracts on Ethereum Sepolia, enabling tamper-proof fundraising with immutable on-chain transaction history — no central authority.
longDescription: Architected with Solidity smart contracts on Ethereum Sepolia testnet. Integrated MetaMask wallet auth via Ethers.js, NextAuth.js session management, and Firebase real-time fund tracking across 100+ test transactions. Zero central authority — all fundraising logic lives on-chain.

title: Polyglot Voice
description: A multilingual platform for language detection, translation, and text-to-speech across 22 languages with a trained Naive Bayes classifier achieving 95%+ real-time classification accuracy.
longDescription: Trained a Multinomial Naive Bayes classifier achieving 95%+ real-time language classification accuracy across 22 languages. Integrated Flask REST API with React.js frontend handling 500+ daily API calls. Firebase auth and Cloudinary media storage for production-grade reliability.
